name: gsd-beads
description: Wires the GSD planning workflow (/gsd:*) to the beads issue tracker (bd), optionally mirrors bd issues two-way (hub-and-spoke) to GitHub Issues, GitLab, Jira, Asana, and Azure Boards, and optionally makes the context-mode knowledge base intent-aware (scope compressed memory by active bd issue + GSD phase). Activates only in repos that use both GSD (.planning/) and beads (.beads/).
